message:
style(trace): replace format!+push_str with writeln! and remove unused imports

Clean up divergence diagnostics module to satisfy clippy format_push_string
lint and remove dead imports.

- Replace format!()+push_str() with write!/writeln! from std::fmt::Write
  throughout to_text() and build_suggestion(), reducing intermediate allocs
- Remove unused CompactRegionId and CompactTaskId imports

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
